name: police_institutional_trust
description: Captures the degree to which citizens trust, legitimize, and positively evaluate law enforcement institutions, encompassing performance ratings, perceived corruption, human rights violations, and willingness to cooperate with police.

name: victimization_exposure
description: Measures the direct experience of crime victimization at the household and personal level, including type, frequency, and reporting behavior, reflecting objective exposure to criminal violence.

name: fear_of_crime_and_risk_perception
description: Measures subjective feelings of insecurity and perceived likelihood of becoming a crime victim, capturing both emotional fear responses and cognitive risk assessments at personal and neighborhood levels.

name: security_avoidance_behavior
description: Captures behavioral adaptations individuals adopt in response to perceived insecurity, including spatial avoidance, curtailment of nighttime activities, and implementation of protective home measures.

name: punitive_authoritarianism
description: Measures the extent to which citizens endorse coercive, punitive, or extrajudicial responses to crime and insecurity, including support for capital punishment, vigilante justice, and the use of violence to combat violence.
